search_candidates.content: ## Main navigation. ###### The “no war, no peace, no oil” status lives on. ## Tentang Ashmore Indonesia. PT Ashmore Asset Management Indonesia Tbk currently operates as an investment manager focusing on three main investment products: stocks, bonds - both local (Rupiah) denominated and denominated in other foreign currencies- and money market. The Company has so far established a strong track record of superior fund performance since its inception. PT Ashmore  Asset Management Indonesia Tbk is an Indonesia Stock Exchange listed company. Registered office and company details:. Current financial overview in the form of a summary of financial position (balance sheet), income statement and ratio. ## What type of investor are you? ## Terms & Conditions.
